notif.title: Notifications
notif.msg.exam_passed: Congratulations! You passed the exam with {score}/{total} ({pct}%). Great job!
notif.msg.exam_failed: You scored {score}/{total} ({pct}%). You needed {needed} more correct answers to pass. Keep practicing!
notif.msg.weak_area: Your accuracy in '{category}' is below 60%. Consider reviewing this topic before your next exam.
notif.msg.streak_achieved: Amazing! You've studied for {days} days in a row. Keep it up to master your driving theory!
notif.msg.study_reminder: You haven't practiced in {days} days. A short session today keeps your knowledge fresh. Let's go!
notif.msg.achievement.first_exam: You completed your very first practice exam. The journey to your driving license has begun!
notif.msg.achievement.perfect_score: Incredible! You answered all 50 questions correctly. You're exam-ready!
notif.msg.achievement.five_exams_passed: You have now passed 5 practice exams. Excellent consistency!
notif.msg.achievement.ten_exams_passed: 10 exams passed! You are truly mastering the Belgian driving theory.
notif.msg.achievement.passing_streak_3: You passed 3 exams in a row! Your driving theory knowledge is rock solid.

auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

exam.rules.title: Exam Rules & Instructions
exam.rules.subtitle: Read carefully before starting your exam
exam.rules.description: Please read and understand these rules before starting
exam.rules.note_stable_internet: Make sure you have a stable internet connection
exam.rules.note_no_refresh: Do not refresh the page during the exam
exam.rules.note_close_apps: Close other applications to avoid distractions
exam.rules.note_once_per_session: You can only take the exam once per session
exam.rules.content.totalQuestions: The exam consists of exactly 50 multiple-choice questions.
exam.rules.content.timeLimit: You have 30 minutes to complete the exam. The timer starts immediately.
exam.rules.content.passScore: To pass, score at least 82% (41 correct answers or more).
exam.rules.content.navigation: Navigate with Previous and Next. Use Overview to see all questions at once.
exam.rules.content.submission: Click Submit Exam when done. Unanswered questions are marked incorrect. You cannot change answers after submission.
exam.rules.content.autoSubmit: The exam will be automatically submitted when the time expires.
exam.question: Question
exam.exit_message: You have an exam in progress. Your answers will be saved, but leaving now may affect your results.

home.hero.headline: Pass Your Belgian Driving Test
home.hero.subtitle: Practice with real exam questions, master 200+ traffic signs, and learn from 31 comprehensive lessons. Everything you need to succeed in your Belgian driving exam.

home.how.subtitle: Three simple steps to exam success

admin.quizzes.delete_failed: Failed to delete question. Please try again.
admin.quizzes.edit_referenced_detail: This question is referenced by quiz attempts or user answer history. You can edit text, explanations, images, and active status, but you cannot change the category, difficulty, question type, answer options, or correct answers.
admin.quizzes.edit_conflict: Cannot change the category, difficulty, question type, or correct answers of a referenced question. Only text, explanations, image, and active status can be updated.
admin.quizzes.reset_confirm_warning: This will permanently delete all quiz attempts and answers marked as test data. Real user data will NOT be affected. This action cannot be undone.
admin.quizzes.reset_error: Failed to reset test data. Please try again.

admin.quizzes.form.error_correct: At least one option must be marked as correct

error_patterns.empty_desc: Take an exam first to see your error patterns and improve your performance.
error_patterns.title: Your Error Patterns
error_patterns.subtitle_after: errors and identified these patterns to help you improve
error_patterns.how_body_suffix: . Each pattern shows affected categories, recommendations, and example questions to practice. Click on any pattern to expand details.
error_patterns.actions_desc: Based on your error patterns, here's what we recommend
error_patterns.rec_sign_confusion: Study the visual differences between similar signs. Focus on shape, color, and border differences. Use the Traffic Signs browser to practice recognition.
error_patterns.rec_supplementary_ignored: Always read the small panels beneath main signs — they contain important exceptions and conditions. Re-read the supplementary signs chapter.
error_patterns.rec_priority_misunderstan: Review priority rules in detail. Remember the hierarchy: tram > emergency vehicle > priority road > right-hand rule. Practice intersection scenarios.
error_patterns.rec_speed_limit_error: Memorise default limits per zone: built-up area 50 km/h, outside 70 km/h, motorway 120 km/h. Speed limit signs always override the default.
error_patterns.rec_zone_confusion: Learn to distinguish zone sign pairs (start/end). Focus on the differences between parking zones, residential zones, and speed zones.
error_patterns.rec_rule_overgeneralizati: Be careful not to apply rules outside their context. Every sign has specific applicability conditions. Study the exception cases carefully.
error_patterns.rec_default: Review the related chapter in the study material and practise the linked questions.

weak_areas.title: Areas for Improvement
weak_areas.subtitle: Focused analysis to help you target and strengthen weak categories
weak_areas.strategy_desc: Focus on critical areas first (below 50% accuracy). Practice these categories daily and review related lessons. Track your progress and celebrate small improvements!
weak_areas.start_improving_desc: Choose your learning path based on your current needs
practice_exam.intro_subtitle: Test yourself with the official Belgian driving theory exam format
practice_exam.rule_questions: 50 multiple choice questions (20 easy · 18 medium · 12 hard)
practice_exam.rule_time: 15 seconds to answer each question after reading
practice_exam.rule_pass: Pass: minimum 41 out of 50 correct answers
practice_exam.rule_choices: 2 to 3 answer options per question, exactly 1 correct
practice_exam.rule_timer: Auto-advance on timeout — unanswered counts as wrong
sign_practice.intro_subtitle: Test yourself with 50 random Belgian traffic sign questions
sign_practice.rule_questions: 50 random traffic sign questions (20 easy · 18 medium · 12 hard)
